item.title: Google To Reportedly Continue Anthropic Deployment For Non-Defense Clients
item.description: According to a report from CNBC, a Google spokesperson said on Friday that the U.S. government’s ‘ban’ of the AI startup does not “preclude” companies...

item.title: Oracle, OpenAI Scrap Texas AI Data Center Expansion Plans; Meta Eyes Site: Report
item.description: According to a report from Bloomberg, Oracle and OpenAI’s fallout has created room for Meta to consider leasing the site.

item.title: US DFC To Reinsure Oil Vessels In Gulf In $20 Billion Plan Amid Middle East War Disruption
item.description: The revolving insurance offering will apply only to vessels that meet the criteria. Insurance will focus on Hull & Machinery and Cargo to start, DFC s...

item.title: Exclusive: Robinhood Ventures Eyes OpenAI, Other 'Highly Valued' Companies For New Fund
item.description: Robinhood Ventures Fund I debuted on the New York Stock Exchange at around $22 per share, almost 12% below its $25 listing price.

item.title: Exclusive: Robinhood Ventures Eyes OpenAI, Other 'Highly Valued' Companies For New Fund
item.description: Robinhood Ventures Fund I debuted on the New York Stock Exchange at around $22 per share, almost 12% below its $25 listing price.
